gist.headline: Tooltips, tamed
gist.blurb: We took a feather duster to the Enter dashboard's tooltips. Hovering over your API keys and usage stats is now a consistently snappy experience, free of weird nested buttons.
gist.summary: Standardized tooltip hover behaviors and styling across the Enter dashboard's pricing, balance, API keys, and usage interfaces.
gist.impact: Users will experience faster, more consistent tooltips without nested button glitches or delayed native browser titles.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing or polishing small floating text boxes (tooltips) in a UI dashboard setting. Maybe holding a feather duster or a tiny wrench, making the floating boxes look neat and uniform.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, carefully polishing a glowing floating text box with a small cloth. A retro computer monitor in the background shows a clean dashboard interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
